title: Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
summary_full: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor.
summary_public: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor.
